Name: Model Ambient Occlusion
Description: Controls per-model ambient occlusion using volume textures and analytic occluders to simulate local shadowing independent of screen-space techniques.

Fields.Name: 3D Texture: Ambient Occlusion Strength
Fields.Description: Controls the intensity of ambient occlusion sampled from the model’s 3D volume texture.

Fields.ID: AOFields - Sphere Occluder - Light Cone Angle
Fields.Name: Sphere Occluder: Light Cone Angle
Fields.Description: Defines the angular spread of the occlusion cone used when evaluating spherical occluders.

Fields.ID: AOFields - Sphere Occluder - Light Cone Coefficient
Fields.Name: Sphere Occluder: Light Cone Coefficient
Fields.Description: Scales the contribution of spherical occluders within the cone, affecting occlusion falloff.

Fields.Name: Sphere Occluder: Length Limit
Fields.Description: Limits the maximum distance over which spherical occluders contribute to ambient occlusion.
